title: Persistent Goal-Seeking Intelligence Accumulation Engine
problem: One-off AI tasks do not compound. They answer, then disappear. A persistent system must accumulate capabilities, evidence, and value over time.
mission: Define the accumulation layer: every accepted workflow improvement becomes an artifact; every artifact receives evidence; every evidence-backed artifact can earn credentials, reputation, and future routing rights.
incremental: Moves from individual proof cards to compounding institutional memory.
value: Capabilities stop being ephemeral and become reusable operating assets that improve future missions.
plans: Persistent Goal-Seeking Intelligence Accumulation Engine proof mission plan
rsi: The accepted artifact may influence future work only after evidence, evaluator review, reviewer validation, scope control, challenge window, rollback readiness, Selection Gate approval, and Chronicle entry.
